name: YouTube Data API v3
description: The YouTube Data API v3 provides access to YouTube data including videos, channels, playlists, comments, live broadcasts, live streams, live chat, subscriptions, captions, and channel memberships. Supports searching, uploading, and managing YouTube content programmatically.

capabilities.name: search_list
capabilities.description: Search for YouTube videos, channels, and playlists matching a query.

capabilities.name: videos_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve details for one or more videos by ID, chart, or user rating.

capabilities.name: videos_insert
capabilities.description: Upload a new video to YouTube.

capabilities.name: videos_update
capabilities.description: Update a video's metadata (title, description, tags, etc.).

capabilities.name: videos_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a video.

capabilities.name: videos_rate
capabilities.description: Add a like or dislike rating to a video.

capabilities.name: videos_get_rating
capabilities.description: Retrieve the rating the authenticated user gave to specified videos.

capabilities.name: videos_report_abuse
capabilities.description: Report a video for abusive content.

capabilities.name: channels_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve channel information by ID, username, handle, or for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: channels_update
capabilities.description: Update a channel's metadata and settings.

capabilities.name: playlists_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve playlists owned by a channel or by ID.

capabilities.name: playlists_insert
capabilities.description: Create a new playlist.

capabilities.name: playlists_update
capabilities.description: Update a playlist's metadata.

capabilities.name: playlists_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a playlist.

capabilities.name: playlist_items_list
capabilities.description: List videos in a playlist.

capabilities.name: playlist_items_insert
capabilities.description: Add a video to a playlist.

capabilities.name: playlist_items_update
capabilities.description: Update a playlist item's position or video reference.

capabilities.name: playlist_items_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a video from a playlist.

capabilities.name: comment_threads_list
capabilities.description: List top-level comment threads for a video or channel.

capabilities.name: comment_threads_insert
capabilities.description: Post a new top-level comment on a video.

capabilities.name: comments_list
capabilities.description: List replies to a comment thread.

capabilities.name: comments_insert
capabilities.description: Post a reply to an existing comment.

capabilities.name: comments_update
capabilities.description: Update a comment's text.

capabilities.name: comments_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a comment.

capabilities.name: comments_set_moderation_status
capabilities.description: Set the moderation status of one or more comments.

capabilities.name: comments_mark_as_spam
capabilities.description: Flag comments as spam.

capabilities.name: captions_list
capabilities.description: List caption tracks for a video.

capabilities.name: captions_insert
capabilities.description: Upload a caption track for a video.

capabilities.name: captions_update
capabilities.description: Update a caption track.

capabilities.name: captions_download
capabilities.description: Download a caption track file.

capabilities.name: captions_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a caption track.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_list
capabilities.description: List channel subscriptions.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_insert
capabilities.description: Subscribe to a channel.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_delete
capabilities.description: Unsubscribe from a channel.

capabilities.name: activities_list
capabilities.description: List channel activity events (uploads, likes, comments, etc.).

capabilities.name: live_broadcasts_list
capabilities.description: List live broadcasts for the authenticated user's channel.

capabilities.name: live_broadcasts_insert
capabilities.description: Create a new live broadcast.

capabilities.name: live_broadcasts_update
capabilities.description: Update a live broadcast's settings.

capabilities.name: live_broadcasts_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a live broadcast.

capabilities.name: live_broadcasts_transition
capabilities.description: Transition a broadcast to a different status.

capabilities.name: live_broadcasts_bind
capabilities.description: Bind a broadcast to a live stream.

capabilities.name: live_streams_list
capabilities.description: List live streams for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: live_streams_insert
capabilities.description: Create a new live stream.

capabilities.name: live_streams_update
capabilities.description: Update a live stream's settings.

capabilities.name: live_streams_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a live stream.

capabilities.name: live_chat_messages_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve live chat messages for a broadcast.

capabilities.name: live_chat_messages_insert
capabilities.description: Send a message to a live chat.

capabilities.name: live_chat_messages_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a live chat message.

capabilities.name: live_chat_moderators_list
capabilities.description: List moderators for a live chat.

capabilities.name: live_chat_moderators_insert
capabilities.description: Add a moderator to a live chat.

capabilities.name: live_chat_moderators_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a moderator from a live chat.

capabilities.name: live_chat_bans_insert
capabilities.description: Ban a user from a live chat.

capabilities.name: live_chat_bans_delete
capabilities.description: Unban a user from a live chat.

capabilities.name: channel_sections_list
capabilities.description: List channel sections (featured content shelves).

capabilities.name: channel_sections_insert
capabilities.description: Create a new channel section.

capabilities.name: channel_sections_update
capabilities.description: Update a channel section.

capabilities.name: channel_sections_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a channel section.

capabilities.name: thumbnails_set
capabilities.description: Upload and set a custom thumbnail for a video.

capabilities.name: i18n_languages_list
capabilities.description: List YouTube's supported content and interface languages.

capabilities.name: i18n_regions_list
capabilities.description: List geographic regions supported by YouTube.

capabilities.name: video_categories_list
capabilities.description: List video categories available in a region.

capabilities.name: video_abuse_report_reasons_list
capabilities.description: List reasons for reporting video abuse.

capabilities.name: members_list
capabilities.description: List channel members (paid memberships).

capabilities.name: membership_levels_list
capabilities.description: List all pricing levels for channel memberships.

capabilities.name: super_chat_events_list
capabilities.description: List Super Chat events for the authenticated user's channel.

capabilities.name: watermarks_set
capabilities.description: Upload and set a channel watermark image.

capabilities.name: watermarks_unset
capabilities.description: Remove a channel watermark.

capabilities.name: channel_banners_insert
capabilities.description: Upload a channel banner image.

capabilities.name: abuse_reports_insert
capabilities.description: File an abuse report.
